questions.question: What core web architecture pattern fundamentally relies exclusively on the Observer Design Pattern?
options: React Component State and Pub/Sub Event Systems
questions.answer: React Component State and Pub/Sub Event Systems
questions.explanation: When React state changes, it automatically notifies all dependent UI components to re-render. A WeatherStation's `setTemp()` function loops through all attached displays and triggers their `update()` methods.

questions.question: What is the primary code-smell that the Strategy Pattern perfectly eliminates?
options: Massive, deeply nested `if-else` or `switch` statements containing wildly different business logic branches.
questions.answer: Massive, deeply nested `if-else` or `switch` statements containing wildly different business logic branches.
questions.explanation: If your Shopping Cart has a 500-line switch statement handling CreditCards vs PayPal vs Apple Pay, the Strategy Pattern cleanly extracts each algorithm into its own isolated class, making them interchangeable at runtime.

questions.question: What advanced system functionality does the Command Pattern gracefully enable by encapsulating method calls into isolated objects?
options: Task Queueing and robust Undo/Redo stacks.
questions.answer: Task Queueing and robust Undo/Redo stacks.
questions.explanation: By storing commands in an Array Stack before executing them, you can pop the last command off the stack and run its dedicated `undo()` method effortlessly.
